hub_subtitle: Business English from the ground up -- your work, your team, your routine

lesson.menu_desc: Telling a short work story -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 6 -- What Happened? -- Telling a Work Story
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 6 -- What Happened?

listenings.text: Let me tell you about a difficult day at work. Last Tuesday, I came to the office early. At nine o'clock, our payment system stopped. Many customers were angry, and my manager was worried. My team and I met in a quick call. We looked at the logs, and we found the problem fast: a server was full. We made a small fix, and we got the system back in one hour. After that, I wrote a short report for my boss. It was a hard morning, but we worked well together. In the end, everything was fine.
